dialog.highlight_theme_marketplace.place:
Marketplace API is reserved for future use.

Built-in themes: Default Dark / Default Light / Solarized Dark.
dialog.ui_theme_marketplace.no_providers: No UI Theme Marketplace providers registered.
dialog.ui_theme_marketplace.placeholder:
UI Theme Marketplace API is reserved for future use.

Built-in UI themes: Dark / Light / Solarized Dark.
dialog.plugin_marketplace.placeholder:
Plugin Marketplace API is reserved for future use.

Currently plugins can be installed manually:
• Global: ~/.python-editor/plugins/<id>/__init__.py
• Project: <project_root>/plugins/<id>/__init__.py
dialog.language_marketplace.placeholder:
Language Marketplace API is reserved for future use.

Currently built-in languages: zh_CN (简体中文) / en_US (English)
dialog.large_file.message:
File size {size} exceeds the threshold {threshold}.

• The file will be streamed in chunks to avoid UI freezing
• Syntax highlighting and code suggestions are temporarily disabled for responsiveness
• They will be re-enabled when you open a smaller file
dialog.toggle_comment.unsupported: Comment toggle is not implemented for {lang}
dialog.goto_definition.not_implemented: Go to Definition is not implemented yet
dialog.find_references.not_implemented: Find References is not implemented yet
dialog.find_documentation.not_implemente: Find Documentation is not implemented yet
dialog.find_documentation.unsupported_la: Find Documentation is not supported for {lang}
dialog.project_settings.no_project: No project attached. Select a project directory?
dialog.about.message:
Python Editor
Version 0.1.0

Built on Tkinter with the in-house Uui widget library.
Syntax highlight / Smart completion / Static check / Run code
dialog.docs.message:
Python Editor

A lightweight multi-language code editor.

Features:
• Syntax highlight (Python / C / C++)
• Smart completion
• Static checks (Flake8 / Pyright / CPython)
• Code runner (Python / GCC / G++)
• Multiple themes

See Help → Shortcuts for the full keybinding list.
dialog.report_issue.message: Please open an issue on the GitHub repository.
shortcuts.text:
File:
  New            Ctrl+N
  Open           Ctrl+O
  Open Project   Ctrl+Shift+O
  Save           Ctrl+S
  Save As        Ctrl+Shift+S
  Run            F5
  Check          Ctrl+R
  Clear Output   Ctrl+L

Edit:
  Undo           Ctrl+Z
  Redo           Ctrl+Y
  Cut            Ctrl+X
  Copy            Ctrl+C
  Paste          Ctrl+V
  Select All     Ctrl+A
  Find           Ctrl+F
  Replace        Ctrl+H
  Go to Line     Ctrl+G
  Toggle Comment Ctrl+/

Query:
  Go to Definition  F12
  Find References   Shift+F12
  Reparse           F6
  Refresh Highlight F7
  Trigger Suggest   Ctrl+Space
  Hide Suggest      Esc

Help:
  Documentation  F1
  Shortcuts      Ctrl+K

settings.msg.apply.success.title: Applied
settings.msg.save.success.title: Saved

settings.msg.reset.confirm.body: Are you sure you want to clear all custom values for the current scope?
settings.ui.theme.label: Interface Theme
settings.ui.highlight_theme.label: Code Highlight Theme
settings.ui.font_family.label: Editor Font
settings.ui.font_size.label: Editor Font Size
settings.ui.show_line_numbers.label: Show Line Numbers
settings.ui.show_line_numbers.desc: Show line numbers on the left.
settings.editor.tab_size.label: Tab Width
settings.editor.tab_size.desc: Number of spaces inserted for Tab.
settings.editor.use_spaces.label: Tab to Spaces
settings.editor.auto_save.label: Auto Save
settings.editor.auto_save.desc: Automatically write to disk after editing stops.
settings.editor.auto_save_delay_ms.label: Auto Save Delay
settings.editor.auto_save_format.label: Auto Save File Name Format
settings.editor.auto_save_format.desc: File name format for auto-save of unnamed files. Available fields: {year} {month} {day} {hour} {minute} {second} {unix.seconds} {unix.float}
settings.editor.word_wrap.label: Auto Wrap
settings.editor.highlight_delay_ms.label: Highlight Delay
settings.editor.highlight_delay_ms.desc: Highlight recalculation delay in milliseconds, 0=no delay.
settings.editor.definition_highlight_dur: How long to highlight the definition line after jumping, in milliseconds. 0=never auto-hide.
settings.editor.suggestion_delay_ms.desc: Delay in milliseconds before triggering suggestions after typing or cursor movement; only the last one is kept when keys are pressed repeatedly or cursor moves quickly. 0=no delay.
settings.editor.large_file_threshold_byt: Files exceeding this byte count are treated as large files: chunked streaming loading is used to avoid UI freezing, and highlighting and suggestions are automatically disabled to ensure responsiveness. Set to 0 to disable this feature (all files go through the original path).
settings.completion.enabled.label: Enable Code Completion
settings.completion.max_visible.label: Visible Candidates
settings.completion.max_visible.desc: Number of visible candidates in dropdown list.
settings.completion.auto_trigger.label: Auto Trigger Completion
settings.completion.min_chars_before_tri: After continuously typing at least this many characters, wait for the suggestion delay before showing the suggestion popup; the count resets when pausing, moving cursor, or pressing non-character keys. Default 1: triggers on every character input after delay; set higher to delay the popup. Set to 0 to disable auto popup (only manual trigger with Ctrl+Space).
settings.checker.run_on_open.label: Check on Open
settings.checker.run_on_open.desc: Run check when file is opened.
settings.checker.run_on_save.label: Check on Save
settings.checker.run_on_save.desc: Run check when file is saved.
settings.checker.timeout_ms.label: Check Timeout
settings.runner.timeout_ms.label: Run Timeout
settings.runner.stream_output.label: Streaming Output
settings.runner.stream_output.desc: Output subprocess stdout/stderr in real-time line by line during execution. When off, output all at once after subprocess completes.
settings.startup.restore_files.label: Restore Last Opened Files
settings.startup.restore_files.desc: Restore files opened in the last session.
settings.i18n.language.label: Interface Language
settings.i18n.language.desc: Interface language switch. Menu/status bar/dialog text will re-render immediately after change.
settings.i18n.language_marketplace.label: Browse Languages...
settings.logging.enabled.label: Enable Logging
settings.logging.enabled.desc: When enabled, records runtime logs to the logs/ directory.
settings.logging.level.label: Log Level
settings.logging.level.desc: Log at this level and above.
settings.logging.file_enabled.label: Write File Logs
settings.logging.console_enabled.label: Output to Console
settings.logging.max_bytes.label: Log File Max Size
settings.logging.max_bytes.desc: Maximum bytes per log file, rotates automatically when exceeded.
settings.logging.backup_count.label: Log Backup Count
settings.logging.backup_count.desc: Number of old log files to keep during rotation.
settings.plugins.marketplace.label: Browse Plugin Marketplace...
settings.project.python_interpreter.desc: Interpreter path; empty uses system default.

settings.project.tab_size.label: Project Tab Width
